jobs.description:
The Continuous Improvement Engineer is responsible for reviewing and monitoring production processes to determine corrective actions within the Pontiac facility.

Responsibilities:
Review and analyze production processes to identify opportunities for improvement and recommend corrective actions. Evaluate plant layout to ensure an efficient manufacturing process and implement improvements in coordination with management.
